channels.name: Krish Naik
channels.positioning: Hands-on data science, machine learning, generative AI, and applied LLM education.
channels.llm_role: Connects LLM concepts to practical data science, RAG, NLP, and developer learning workflows.

channels.name: Andrej Karpathy
channels.positioning: Technical, first-principles education on neural networks, transformers, tokenisation, and practical LLM building blocks.
channels.llm_role: Deep technical baseline for understanding how LLMs work under the hood.

channels.name: Yannic Kilcher
channels.positioning: Research-paper analysis, model architecture critique, open-source AI commentary, and technical debate.
channels.llm_role: Bridges research papers and practitioner interpretation.

channels.name: Matthew Berman
channels.positioning: Hands-on AI tooling, open-source model demos, agent workflows, and product experiments.
channels.llm_role: Shows applied usage of LLM tools and agent/product workflows.

channels.name: Nicholas Renotte
channels.positioning: Project-based machine learning, deep learning, and AI engineering tutorials.
channels.llm_role: Shows practical implementation patterns for AI developers building with Python, ML, and LLM-adjacent tooling.

channels.name: COLE MEDIN
channels.positioning: AI automation, agent building, and practical AI coding workflows.
channels.llm_role: Focuses on applied LLM agents, automations, and production-style AI workflows.
